entities.name: Organizer Tally System
entities.context: Scoring system that tracks event organizers and increments their tally based on attended events

entities.name: Priority Organizers
entities.context: Manually designated organizers who receive a +5.0 bonus in the scoring system

entities.name: Trust Building
entities.context: Principle that organizer trust accumulates over time through repeated positive interactions

relationships.context: Priority organizers receive +5.0 bonus points in the tally system
Higher tally scores (+0.5 per attended event) represent accumulated trust over time
